name: n8n-mcp
description: MCP server for n8n: generate, lint, diff workflows; explain, replay, and time failed executions; drive a live n8n instance.
long_description: Debugging-first MCP server for n8n. Generates workflow JSON from plain English, lints with 20+ rules, diffs deployed vs local, explains why an execution dropped items, builds replay workflows for stubborn nodes, renders execution timelines, and (when N8N_API_URL + N8N_API_KEY are set) drives a live n8n instance via the REST API.

n8n_api_url.title: n8n API URL
n8n_api_url.description: Base URL of your n8n instance (e.g. https://n8n.example.com). Leave blank to use only the offline tools (generate, lint, diff, explain, replay, timeline, scaffold).

n8n_api_key.title: n8n API Key
n8n_api_key.description: Personal API key from n8n Settings -> API. Required for the REST tools.

read_only.title: Read-only mode
read_only.description: Set to '1' to disable workflow.create, workflow.activate, and node.scaffold.

allowed_workflow_ids.title: Allowed workflow IDs (comma-separated)
allowed_workflow_ids.description: If set, REST tools refuse to touch workflows outside this list.

allowed_tags.title: Allowed tags (comma-separated)
allowed_tags.description: If set, workflow.list filters results to workflows carrying at least one of these tags.

tools.name: workflow.generate
tools.description: Generate workflow JSON from plain English.

tools.name: execution.explain
tools.description: Explain why a failed execution misbehaved.

tools.name: execution.replay
tools.description: Build a replay workflow isolating one node.

tools.name: node.scaffold
tools.description: Scaffold a custom node TypeScript skeleton.

tools.name: workflow.list
tools.description: List workflows on a live n8n instance.

tools.name: workflow.create
tools.description: Create a workflow on a live n8n instance.

tools.name: execution.list
tools.description: List recent executions on a live n8n instance.
